overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through Night City during golden hour. The player navigates under massive elevated highways, through neon-lit commercial plazas, and past futuristic skyscrapers with ray-traced reflections and cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with industrial infrastructure

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle straight through urban canyon beneath massive elevated highways

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass dominating the upper frame with steel support beams
large circular stadium structure with metallic framework visible in the distance
tall electrical pylons with multiple power lines stretching across the sky
tall building with distinctive yellow and green neon geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle ride beneath massive elevated highway structures in a futuristic urban environment. The camera moves steadily forward through shadowed asphalt roads, with a large stadium visible to the left and industrial transmission towers to the right. The lighting is diffused by the overhead structures, creating a contrast between the shaded road and the bright golden hour sky visible ahead.

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass into direct golden hour sunlight, creating lens flare
passing a silver sedan on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the open highway while maneuvering around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving in parallel lane, slightly ahead of the motorcycle

entered.detail: multiple large LED advertising screens displaying colorful neon advertisements
tall glass and steel tower with illuminated windows rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle emerges from under the overpass into bright golden hour sunlight, causing a lens flare effect. The scene transitions to a more open commercial highway lined with large digital billboards on the right. The player passes a silver sedan while driving toward a futuristic skyscraper visible in the distance, with the elevated highway structure now visible to the left.

events.description: making a right turn at the intersection into a commercial street with neon signage

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate a right turn at the intersection, leaning into the curve

entered.detail: ground-level commercial building with large glass windows and signage
suspended traffic signal showing green light above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The player executes a right turn at a commercial intersection, transitioning from the main highway to a narrower street lined with storefronts. The camera leans into the turn, revealing pedestrians walking on the sidewalks and neon signage on nearby buildings. The elevated highway structure disappears from view as the motorcycle enters a more enclosed commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with medical clinic and outdoor seating

events.description: entering a covered plaza area with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights
making a left turn around the plaza corner, navigating around outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: slowly navigating through the plaza, making a left turn around the corner near outdoor tables

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking along the sidewalk near the storefronts

entered.detail: storefront with illuminated green medical cross sign indicating a clinic or pharmacy
blue plastic chairs and tables arranged outside a cafe or restaurant
large water puddles on the asphalt reflecting the neon signs and sky

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a semi-covered urban plaza with wet pavement creating reflective puddles. A medical clinic with a green cross sign is visible on the left, while outdoor seating occupies the right side. The player makes a left turn around the plaza corner, navigating slowly past pedestrians and under the shadow of overhead structures, with neon signs reflecting in the water on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway underpass with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: overtaking a large industrial truck on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the highway and overtaking a large truck on the right

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck with red cab driving in the right lane, being overtaken by the motorcycle

entered.detail: curved on-ramp structure connecting to the main elevated highway above
large metal pipes and industrial scaffolding along the right side of the road
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle accelerates onto a highway section beneath elevated ramps, passing industrial structures and graffiti-covered walls. The player overtakes a large red industrial truck on the right side while driving under the shadow of concrete overpasses. The environment shifts back to a more industrial character with metal piping and highway infrastructure dominating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway approaching downtown landmark tower

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed toward the distinctive tower landmark visible in the distance

entered.detail: unique skyscraper with angular architecture and illuminated sections, serving as a city landmark
tall palm trees lining the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up to a wide highway with clear views of the sky and a distinctive futuristic tower dominating the horizon. The motorcycle cruises toward this landmark, passing palm trees on the right as the industrial structures recede into the background. The golden hour lighting creates long shadows and warm tones across the asphalt as the journey continues toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle ride that transitions from the shadowed depths of an industrial overpass into a bright, neon-lit commercial district. It begins beneath massive elevated highway structures, moving through diffused light past a large stadium and industrial transmission towers. As the motorcycle emerges from the shade, the scene bursts into bright golden hour sunlight with a lens flare, opening up onto a wide highway lined with digital billboards and a distant futuristic skyscraper. The camera then leans into a sharp right turn at a commercial intersection, shifting from the open road to a narrower street. Finally, the elevated structures vanish from view as the ride enters an enclosed urban corridor filled with pedestrians and glowing neon storefronts.

The shot follows a continuous motorcycle journey that transitions from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban plaza into a wide-open highway under a golden sky. It begins by navigating slowly through a semi-covered plaza, where the camera glides past a medical clinic and outdoor seating while neon signs shimmer in wet pavement puddles. As the rider makes a left turn, the scene shifts into a gritty industrial corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses, passing graffiti-covered walls and overtaking a large red truck amidst a network of metal piping. The environment then opens up as the motorcycle accelerates away from the shadows and into a broad highway flanked by palm trees. Finally, the industrial structures recede into the background, leaving a clear view of a towering futuristic landmark dominating the horizon under the warm, long shadows of the golden hour.
